name: Okta: List AD Servers with Okta Agents
description: Lists all AD servers with Okta agents installed.
query:
MATCH (agent:Okta_Agent)
MATCH (server:Computer)
WHERE toUpper(server.samaccountname) = toUpper(agent.name + '$') AND toUpper(server.domain) = toUpper(agent.poolName)
RETURN agent,server
LIMIT 1000
